fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order number.

fields.name: Recording No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that is assigned to the physical inventory recording.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Line No. of the linked physical inventory order line.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that was counted when taking the physical inventory.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location where the item was counted during taking the physical inventory.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin where the item was counted while performing the physical inventory.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the additional description of the item.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure used for the item, for example bottle or piece.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item of the physical inventory recording line.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Quantity on the line, expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a value was entered in Quantity of the physical inventory recording line.

fields.name: Use Item Tracking
fields.tooltip: Specifies if it is necessary to record the item using serial, lot or package numbers.

fields.name: Date Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the physical inventory was taken.

fields.name: Time Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the physical inventory was taken.

fields.name: Person Recorded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the person who performed the physical inventory.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the entered item.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number of the entered item.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number of the entered item.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to the item number as defined by the item's barcode.
